name: A2A Message Bus
description: Agent-to-Agent async message bus with SQLite persistence, broadcast support, and auto-deliver push notify

agents.description: Valid agent IDs. Empty array = accept any agent (open mode)

sessionAware.description: Use session resolver for push notify (v3). When true and no session found, notify is skipped.

preferredSessionKey.description: Preferred session key pattern. Supports {agentId} template variable.
